task_completion.description: Verify that the three defective laptops (LPT-ERR-01, LPT-ERR-02, LPT-ERR-03) have been checked in and their status is set to 'Retired'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Snipe-IT asset list or individual asset pages. The status badge for LPT-ERR-01, LPT-ERR-02, and LPT-ERR-03 should display 'Retired' and they should no longer be checked out to any user.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'RMA-9988' has been appended to the Notes field of the defective assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset details, history, or list view for LPT-ERR-01, LPT-ERR-02, and LPT-ERR-03. The Notes section must contain the text 'RMA-9988'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and assignment of replacement asset LPT-REP-01.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset LPT-REP-01 in Snipe-IT. It must have Serial 'NEW-SN-01', be checked out to user 'jdoe', and its Model, Purchase Date, and Purchase Cost must exactly match those of LPT-ERR-01.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and assignment of replacement asset LPT-REP-02.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset LPT-REP-02 in Snipe-IT. It must have Serial 'NEW-SN-02', be checked out to user 'asmith', and its Model, Purchase Date, and Purchase Cost must exactly match those of LPT-ERR-02.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and assignment of replacement asset LPT-REP-03.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for asset LPT-REP-03 in Snipe-IT. It must have Serial 'NEW-SN-03', be checked out to user 'bwayne', and its Model, Purchase Date, and Purchase Cost must exactly match those of LPT-ERR-03.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the Snipe-IT GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser window, not terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The asset lists and details should be rendered normally within the Snipe-IT application, not typed into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to visually spoof the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and modifying the DOM to fake the 'Retired' status or asset details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Original assignments: LPT-ERR-01 was assigned to 'jdoe', LPT-ERR-02 to 'asmith', and LPT-ERR-03 to 'bwayne'. Therefore, the replacement laptops must be checked out to these exact users respectively (LPT-REP-01 to jdoe, LPT-REP-02 to asmith, LPT-REP-03 to bwayne). The purchase costs and dates for the ERR laptops were randomized during setup; you must verify that the REP laptops' costs and dates exactly match whatever the ERR laptops' costs and dates were.
